fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Design a four-legged robot that can walk over rough terrain"
"Create a robotic arm that can pick up and sort objects by color"
"Build a humanoid robot that can mimic human dance moves"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Simulate how different floor materials affect robot slip"
"Test the stability of a tower of blocks when pushed by a robot"
"Explore how changing gravity impacts jumping height"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Experiment with sensor placements to improve obstacle avoidance"
"Try different actuator strengths to see how fast a robot can sprint"
"Experiment with soft vs rigid grippers for delicate objects"
